scope: Operator SOP training and assessment with 100% attendance

training_modules.title: Admin login and operator JWT handling
training_modules.evidence: Operators can log in and identify their operator profile without sharing tokens.

training_modules.title: Queue triage and priority handling
training_modules.evidence: Operators can filter WAITING_OPERATOR and understand P0-P3 priority order.

training_modules.title: Handoff task workflow
training_modules.evidence: Operators can lock a task, reply, return to AI, and escalate when needed.

training_modules.title: S/A/B/C/D level handling
training_modules.evidence: Operators know S/A use manual_premium, B uses ai_assisted, and C/D use ai_auto.

training_modules.title: Safety, crisis, minor protection, and S5 recovery
training_modules.evidence: Operators pause conversion and escalate safety-sensitive conversations.

training_modules.title: Script recommendation and editing boundaries
training_modules.evidence: Operators use approved script materials and avoid unsupported claims.

training_modules.title: Quality scoring and review notes
training_modules.evidence: Operators understand passed, needs_review, failed, and issue_tags.

training_modules.title: Beta monitoring and incident pause rules
training_modules.evidence: Operators can identify stale HUMAN_LOCKED tasks and pause triggers.

assessment.retake_policy: Any operator below 85 or missing a practical check must repeat training before handling beta traffic.

operating_sla.privacy_rule: Do not export user message text, phone numbers, tokens, payment details, or private profile data outside approved admin tools.

acceptance: Every listed operator completed all required modules.
Every listed operator passed the assessment with score >= 85.
Operators understand handoff workflow, safety escalation, quality scoring, and beta pause rules.
H-09 is ready to unblock P5-10 runbook rehearsal.
